text: Écoutez le document sonore et la question. Choisissez la bonne réponse. Alors, juste avant les repas de réveillon, dernier petit conseil, avant... Pendant, afin, what do you consey? Pendant I consecration because it's the fit and the people profit. But after it will certainly have attention to diminutional consumation of alcohol, pass it to low, and diminute also his quantity. Selon cette personne, que doit-on faire pendant les fêtes?
